RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0012 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: James Silva Date of Birth: 02/10/1967 SSN (tokenized): TKN-712672 Annual Income: $168,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $44,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Austin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN54367AL Tesla Corolla 2024 EV Used 18,000 VIN67297AL Nissan Leaf 2019 Hybrid CPO 16,000 Authorized Signature: James Silva
